allow: PowerShell($r3000 = try { \(Invoke-WebRequest http://localhost:3000 -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10\).StatusCode } catch { "err" }; $r3001 = try { \(Invoke-WebRequest http://localhost:3001 -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10\).StatusCode } catch { "err" }; $r3002 = try { \(Invoke-WebRequest http://localhost:3002 -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10\).StatusCode } catch { "err" }; $r3003 = try { \(Invoke-WebRequest http://localhost:3003 -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15\).StatusCode } catch { "err" }; "3000=$r3000 3001=$r3001 3002=$r3002 3003=$r3003")
